# General Task Advice Fixture

현재 task direction은 fixed execution plan이 아니라 conditional candidate registry다.

| Directive ID | Change class | Consumption state | 필수 행동 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `TA-C01-EVIDENCE-FIRST` | in-place selection revision | `pending` | current premise를 먼저 재현해야 한다 |
| `TA-C02-ONE-OWNER` | in-place scope revision | `pending` | 하나의 primary owner만 선택한다 |
| `TA-C03-SATISFIABILITY` | in-place acceptance revision | `pending` | 실행 전에 satisfiability를 검사한다 |
| `TA-C04-SCOPED-PROGRESS` | in-place closeout revision | `pending` | task와 global outcome을 분리한다 |
| `TA-C05-SOURCE-OPAQUE` | existing governance invariant | `pending` | source metadata는 opaque ID로 보존한다 |
| `TA-C06-NO-OVERCLAIM` | existing validation invariant | `pending` | fixture pass를 semantic pass로 승격하지 않는다 |

## Current debt routing

- directive_id: `TA-C09-CURRENT-DEBT-ROUTING`
- change_class: `in-place derive revision`
- consumption_state: `pending`

The current debt route must be reproduced before selection.

## Reconstruction readiness

- directive_id: `TA-C07-RECONSTRUCTION-READINESS`
- change_class: `proposed contract revision`
- consumption_state: `pending`

The readiness clause must remain conjunctive.

## Scoped closeout

- directive_id: `TA-C08-SCOPED-CLOSEOUT`
- change_class: `in-place lifecycle revision`
- consumption_state: `pending`

The closeout clause must keep outcome scopes separate.

| Candidate | Owner | Note |
